signals.title: Justice Department Settlement on Social Media Coercion
signals.summary: The DOJ settled litigation alleging that the Biden administration induced social media companies to suppress disfavored speech.
key_provisions: Implementation of measures to prevent government-induced content suppression
Acknowledgment of the need to protect free speech rights on online platforms
